categories.name: Dev Tools
categories.description: Tools that enhance developer productivity, such as IDEs, editors, or developer environments.

categories.name: Web Frameworks
categories.description: Repositories that provide frameworks for building web applications, including frontend and backend frameworks.

categories.name: System & OS
categories.description: Projects related to operating systems, core system software, or low-level infrastructure.

categories.name: Data & ML
categories.description: Repositories focused on data processing, machine learning, or AI-related tools and models.

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Repositories that do not clearly fit into the above categories based on content and domain.
